title: lanonia poilanei
intro: Lanonia poilanei, also known as the white lanonia, is a tropical evergreen shrub native to New Caledonia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lanonia poilanei are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Lanonia poilanei include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
